statement.markdown:
# Page Transition Slide
Create a page transition effect where sliding elements slide from left to right. The effect will be triggered from button click.

## Requirements
1. Use CSS transitions and animations for the sliding effect.
2. Make it work across different window sizes (responsive).
3. Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
4. The sliding elements should be reusable and can be customized via the attributes.
5. The animation should be smooth and visually appealing.
6. Include a button to trigger the sliding effect.
7. Add a loading animation while the transition is happening.
8. Display a message after the transition is complete.
